name: Dagim Faji Dandena
summary: Network Engineer and IT Support Specialist experienced in designing, managing, and securing end-to-end enterprise infrastructures. Serve as the sole IT personnel for an industrial manufacturing facility , directing and managing all network operations, systems administration, and technical support.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

experience.title: Deputy IT-Supervisor
experience.company: Kingdom (Ethiopia) Linen PLC, Adama Industrial Park, Ethiopia
responsibilities: Implemented an operational continuity plan, ensuring data integrity and rapid system restoration following potential disruptions in a 40+ user environment.

Enforced network security policies across networking devices—including file encryption systems,  ACLs, and DDNS management—to protect critical manufacturing systems from unauthorized access alongside the headquarters team
Facilitated the procurement and implementation of new networking hardware and software, optimizing network performance and reducing operational costs by 50-80%.
Supervise IT operations, supporting over 40 users, maintaining 24/7 system uptime through proactive monitoring and preventive maintenance.
Oversaw installation and maintenance of network hardware, Windows servers, and user workstations, reducing incident resolution time by 30%.
Collaborated with HR, finance, and production departments to resolve IT issues, enhancing interdepartmental support efficiency by 25%.
Enforced IT security and data integrity policies using Windows Firewall and remote access tools (AnyViewer, AnyDesk), achieving full compliance during internal audits.

experience.title: IT Support Specialist
experience.company: Kingdom (Ethiopia) Linen PLC, Adama Industrial Park, Ethiopia
responsibilities: Provided remote and on-site technical support to 40+ users, resolving hardware, software, and network issues using tools like AnyDesk and AnyViewer within an average response time of 30 minutes.
Secured endpoints and improved system reliability through software patching, antivirus deployment, and routine infrastructure maintenance.
Maintained continuous uptime for enterprise applications, ERP systems, and productivity tools critical to manufacturing operations 24/7.
Operated as the primary technical responder for 40+ users, independently managing all IT helpdesk operations and ensuring the rapid resolution of network and hardware issues
Managed a custom-built helpdesk ticketing system, handling over 100 tickets monthly and maintaining a 95% first-contact resolution rate.
Applied regular Windows security patches and updates, and successfully utilized System Restore to recover several gigabytes of critical data during system failures.

experience.title: IT Specialist
experience.company: Kingdom (Ethiopia) Linen PLC, Adama Industrial Park, Ethiopia
responsibilities: Configured and maintained LAN, W AN, and wireless network infrastructures across production environments within a 32-hectare premises.
Executed infrastructure upgrades that reduced network latency by 70%, minimized downtime, and enhanced system responsiveness.
Managed the IT asset lifecycle, coordinating the setup, maintenance, and replacement of all technical hardware.

experience.title: IT Support Officer
experience.company: Kingdom (Ethiopia) Linen PLC, Adama Industrial Park, Ethiopia
responsibilities: Delivered onsite and remote technical support for hardware, software, and peripheral issues for 50+ users
Documented recurring network and technical issues, creating support records for trend analysis that reduced problem identification time by 50%
Identified and resolved hardware and software malfunctions, improving user productivity by minimizing system downtime by 75%
Tracked and resolved support tickets via internal helpdesk, including restoring failed surveillance cameras, significantly improving workplace security and response time.

experience.title: IT Clerk
experience.company: Kingdom (Ethiopia) Linen PLC, Adama Industrial Park, Ethiopia
responsibilities: Expedited 100% of users onboarding, managed Computers setups, and established baseline IT administration protocols.
Supported preventive maintenance activities and contributed to the technical documentation for the facility's IT framework in the first year.

Created internal documentation for recurring technical issues and resolutions to improve troubleshooting efficiency.
